_schema.purpose: Records user-approved Cursor<->Copilot AI-docs divergences ('a previous user remark allows it'). The parity checker (scripts/ai_docs_parity.py) suppresses any divergence whose current signature is listed here.
_schema.how_to_add: When the user says a difference is intentional, copy the 'signature: ...' value the checker printed for that finding into a new object under 'allow', with a short 'reason' and today's date. The signature embeds the normalized content hashes of BOTH sides, so if either file changes again the approval auto-expires and the divergence resurfaces.

entry_fields.signature: exact signature string from the checker (pair_id|cursor_hash|github_hash)
entry_fields.reason: why this divergence is allowed (the user's remark, paraphrased)
